name: ProgressBar
description: Animated horizontal progress bar with color-coded states and real-time percentage display for IBM Business Automation Workflow

configOptions.name: showPercentage
configOptions.label: Show Percentage
configOptions.description: Display the percentage value above the progress bar

configOptions.name: showStatus
configOptions.label: Show Status
configOptions.description: Display status message below the progress bar

configOptions.name: animated
configOptions.label: Animated
configOptions.description: Enable smooth transition animations for progress changes

configOptions.name: customMessages
configOptions.label: Custom Messages
configOptions.description: Custom status messages (object with notStarted, inProgress, complete properties)

configOptions.name: progressChanged
configOptions.label: Progress Changed
configOptions.description: Event fired when progress value changes
